mlkit_advanced_unsupported: Ẹrọ lọwọlọwọ ko ṣe atilẹyin ML Kit To ti ni ilọsiwaju
permission_reason: Lati rii daju pe ferese atunkọ ati idanimọ ọrọ ṣiṣẹ daradara, jọwọ gba awọn igbanilaaye wọnyi laaye:
engine_whisper_desc: Lo whisper.cpp; lẹhin wiwa ipari gbolohun kan, gbogbo gbolohun naa yoo jẹ kikọ, pẹlu idaduro ti bii awọn aaya 3-5.
engine_mlkit_basic_desc: Lilo ML Kit Basic, wa lori ọpọlọpọ awọn ẹrọ Android 12+.
engine_mlkit_advanced_desc: Lati lo ML Kit To ti ni ilọsiwaju, ẹrọ kan ti o ṣe atilẹyin AICore/Gemini Nano nilo.
cancel_download_message: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ fagilee gbigbasile {awoṣe}? Ilọsiwaju igbasilẹ lọwọlọwọ yoo sọnu.
delete_model_message: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ paarẹ {awoṣe}? Iṣẹ ṣiṣe yii yoo yọ faili awoṣe ti a gbasilẹ kuro, ati pe iwọ yoo nilo lati ṣe igbasilẹ lẹẹkansii ṣaaju ki o to le lo.
model_not_downloaded: Awoṣe ko tii ṣe igbasilẹ sibẹsibẹ
translation_desc: Ede orisun naa jẹ lilo si ML Kit ati paapaa si Whisper nigbati a ba ṣiṣẹ itumọ.
translation_enabled_desc: Ṣe afihan orisun ati awọn atunkọ ti a tumọ
translation_disabled_desc: Ṣe afihan awọn atunkọ orisun nikan
error_no_overlay: Yiyọ awọn ohun elo miiran ko ti gba laaye sibẹsibẹ.
error_no_record: A ko gba igbanilaaye gbigba silẹ.
error_no_notification: Igbanilaaye iwifunni ko ti gba laaye.
error_checksum_failed: Ifọwọsi awoṣe kuna: SHA-1 ti {awoṣe} ko baramu ile-ipamọ osise naa.
error_accessibility_service_unavailable: Iṣẹ Wiwọle Apejuwe ko ni asopọ. Duro fun iṣẹju diẹ ki o tun gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
error_model_download_requires_network: Awoṣe ọrọ ko ti ṣe igbasilẹ. Sopọ si intanẹẹti ki o tun gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
error_sha1_mismatch: SHA-1 ibaamu, ti a nireti {ti a reti}, gangan {gangan}
mlkit_downloading: Awoṣe {engine} naa tun n ṣe igbasilẹ.
mlkit_unsupported: {engine} ko ṣe atilẹyin ẹrọ tabi ede yii.
status_running: Awọn atunkọ akoko gidi ni ilọsiwaju

error_translate_source_unsupported: ML Kit ko ṣe atilẹyin ede orisun: {tag1} ({tag2})
error_translate_target_unsupported: ML Kit ko ṣe atilẹyin ede ibi-afẹde: {tag1} ({tag2})
